headline: Scale Your Agency Without Scaling Your Headcount
description: Deploy AI employees that handle campaign execution, reporting, and client communication — freeing your team to focus on strategy and creative.

pain_points.point: Client reporting takes hours every week
Talent costs are rising faster than margins

solutions.title: Automated Campaign Reporting
solutions.description: Mikaeel generates comprehensive campaign reports automatically, pulling data from all platforms and delivering insights, not just numbers.

solutions.title: Content Production at Scale
solutions.description: Layla drafts, edits, and schedules content across channels — maintaining your clients' brand voice while multiplying your output.

solutions.title: Client Communication Management
solutions.description: Never miss a client update. Layla manages communication workflows, ensuring timely, professional touchpoints throughout the relationship.
